headline: Is It Time To Reassess AES (AES) After The Recent Take Private Bid At US$15?
summary: Wondering whether AES at around US$14.49 is priced attractively or already reflects the story? This breakdown will help you work out what you are really paying for. AES has returned 0.1% over the last 7 days and 3.5% over the last 30 days, while the 1 year return of 52.4% contrasts with longer term 3 year and 5 year returns of 30.2% and 37.4% declines. Recent attention on AES has been shaped by broader interest in utilities and power-related names, with investors reassessing how they value...

headline: AES Leadership Shift Refocuses Accounting Oversight And Clean Energy Governance
summary: AES (NYSE:AES) has appointed Aubrey Jarred as Vice President and Controller, naming Jarred the company’s principal accounting officer. Bernerd Da Santos is moving into the roles of Chairman of the AES Clean Energy Board and Senior Strategic Advisor. These leadership and board realignments reshape financial oversight and governance responsibilities at AES. AES is a global power company focused on electricity generation and related energy services, including clean energy initiatives through...
